metadata.title: Express Savings Account | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: Meezan Express Savings Account has been designed to facilitate the beneficiaries of home remittance and encourage them to use formal banking channels.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login اردو Express Savings Account Open an Express Savings Account If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print Designed to facilitate the beneficiaries of home remittance Meezan Express Savings Account has been designed of home remittance and encourage them to use formal banking channels. The biggest advantage of Meezan Express Savings Accounts is it can be opened on the basis of a CNIC only* & there is NO WITHHOLDING TAX on cash withdrawals through cheque or ATM. *Terms and Conditions apply Meezan Express Savings account can be opened in PKR only Outward Foreign remittances are not allowed from Express Savings account Savings account can only be fed through home remittances, no other credits are allowed Debit cards issued on Meezan Express Savings accounts can only be used locally (Pay Pak Debit Cards) Key Features Chequebook Issuance of chequebook in accordance with the Schedule of Charges (SOCs) Free Pay Orders Pay Orders Free Internet Banking Free Internet Banking facility Profit Payment & Calculation Profit will be paid on monthly basis and calculated on daily basis Online Branch Banking Free Online banking service at all Meezan Bank branches Withdrawals No Restriction on withdrawals amount How the Express Savings Account Works Download Fatwa On agreeing to become a Rupee Meezan Express Account holder, the customer enters into a relationship based on Mudarabah with Meezan Bank. Under this relationship, the customer is an Investor (Rab-ul-Maal) and the Bank is the Manager (Mudarib) of the funds deposited by the customers. The Bank allocates the funds received from the customers to a deposit pool; funds from the pool are utilized to provide financing to customers under Islamic modes that include, but are not restricted to Murabaha, Ijarah, Istisna and Diminishing Musharkah. Profit Sharing Ratio Bank will share 50% of Gross Income as Mudarib Depositor Gross Income as Rab-ul-Maal Weightages for the Month of April 2026 September Tier Groups Weightage Assigned Express Savings Account Monthly 0.45 Consolidated Weightages Profit Rates Profit Rates the Month of February 2026 Products Tenure Profit Assigned Express Saving Account Monthly 6.34% Profit Rates Historical Profit Rates Want to an Express Savings Account? Download, Print, Fill Form PDF version of our printed Account Opening Form is also available for download. You can print the form, fill your details and submit it along with the required documents at your preferred branch. Download Form Visit a Branch You may visit any branch of Meezan Bank and our staff will assist you in filling the Account Opening Form and opening your account. Locate a Branch Get Contacted Fill out the form below to be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. Get Contacted Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Get contacted by our representative! the form below and you'll be guided about how you can open your new account. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today? By using this AI assistant, you acknowledge and agree that... read more Copy link ✓ Thanks for sharing! Find any service AddToAny More…
